ogTitle: Peerabeelup vs Pegs Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Peerabeelup and Pegs Creek.
heading: Peerabeelup vs Pegs Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Peerabeelup, Western Australia and Pegs Creek, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pegs Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Peerabeelup (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Peerabeelup or Pegs Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Peerabeelup has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Pegs Creek scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Peerabeelup scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Pegs Creek scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Peerabeelup or Pegs Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pegs Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
